plugins.name: ali1688-seller-assistant
plugins.descEn: One-stop support for 1688 merchants, from shop diagnosis to product operations, helping sellers read data clearly, optimize listings, and boost conversion.

plugins.name: alibabacloud-core
plugins.descEn: Core Alibaba Cloud plugin for OpenAPI SDK code generation through a constrained MCP server.

plugins.name: alibabacloud-spec-ops
plugins.descEn: Alibaba Cloud AI Ops Plugin - Infrastructure operations workflow with intelligent planning, validation, and execution powered by MCP tooling.

plugins.name: consulting-delivery
plugins.descEn: Full-cycle management consulting toolkit covering seven core scenarios: desk research, interview notes, framework design, report writing, benchmarking, weekly status reports, and executive briefings. Works independently; connecting a document collaboration platform enables automatic publishing to Notion.

plugins.name: contract-management
plugins.descEn: Full-lifecycle contract management: review contract risks (red/yellow/green grading), draft contract first drafts (Word output), redline comparison of two contract versions, rapid NDA screening, and legal clause lookup.

plugins.name: corporate-finance-tax
plugins.descEn: Corporate finance and tax management toolkit covering financial analysis, journal entries, budget analysis, VAT management, annual CIT settlement, internal audit, financial statement prep, and tax planning.

plugins.name: corporate-legal
plugins.descEn: Comprehensive corporate legal assistant: draft legal documents (demand letters, complaints, defense statements, legal opinions), generate corporate resolutions and articles of association, support compliance reviews.

plugins.name: equity-research
plugins.descEn: End-to-end equity research toolkit for sell-side and buy-side analysts, covering deep-dive reports, industry research, annual report analysis, earnings reviews, field research notes, and valuation models.

plugins.name: investment-banking
plugins.descEn: AI-powered investment banking assistant covering six core workflows: IPO prospectus drafting, M&A advisory reports, bond offering memoranda, regulatory response to exchange inquiries, fairness opinions, and pitchbook generation.

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.descEn: Full-spectrum marketing toolkit covering copywriting, ad compliance, competitive tracking, campaign planning, social media trends, SEO optimization, marketing performance analysis, and content calendars.

plugins.name: pe-vc-investment
plugins.descEn: End-to-end PE/VC toolkit covering deal screening, due diligence checklists, term sheet review, investment committee memos, return modeling, and exit analysis. Built for investment professionals.

plugins.name: product-design
plugins.descEn: A full-process toolkit for designers, covering eleven core scenarios: problem definition, user research, information architecture, interaction flows, visual standards, marketing assets, design reviews, and design system maintenance.

plugins.name: product-management
plugins.descEn: An end-to-end product management toolkit covering eight core workflows: PRD writing, user story breakdown, competitive analysis, requirement prioritization, user feedback analysis, launch planning, roadmap communication, and metrics reviews.

plugins.name: qoder-for-cn-litigation
plugins.displayCn: 中国民商事诉讼工具箱
plugins.descEn: Full-lifecycle Chinese civil & commercial litigation toolkit for legal counsel and attorneys. 20 skills across four layers: routing (hub + onboarding interview + quick-config editor), evidence, pleadings, and strategy.

plugins.name: wealth-management
plugins.descEn: Full-spectrum wealth management toolkit covering market snapshots, asset allocation, fund analysis, client reporting, financial planning, and tax planning. Built for relationship managers and advisors.

plugins.name: yqx-tech-service-suite
plugins.descEn: A full-chain technology service toolkit bridging demand and supply in a closed loop. The demand side covers tech demand mining, results search & matching, value assessment, deal planning. Supply side covers capability profiling and opportunity matching.
